name: Stickman Archers: Waves
author: Poki
description: Become a real sharpshooter in Stickman Archers: Waves! In this archery game, its up to you to progress through the many waves of enmeies with your trusty bow. As you progress, you can earn coins to both upgrade your characters looks and make your bow stronger. You can get a triple-shot, fire arrows and ice arrows to add to your arsenal - and you'll need them to battle the bosses ahead! Can you become the ultimate archer? How to play Stickman Archers: Waves? Use the mouse to aim and shoot! Who created Stickman Archers: Waves? Stickman Archers: Waves was created by Vanorium. Play their other games on Poki: Stickman Fight: Ragdoll , Noob Drive and Noob Archer ! How can I play Stickman Archers: Waves for free? You can play Stickman Archers: Waves for free on Poki. Can I play Stickman Archers: Waves on mobile devices and desktop? Stickman Archers: Waves can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
